screen_metadata.name: Bill of Materials Material-Staging & Pick Verification Canvas

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px component kitting worksheet canvas interface)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Split Worksheet Shell (Left Workspace Panel: Active Material Allocation Checklist detailing component quantities required vs. quantities picked; Right Contextual Sidebar Panel: SCM Spatial Bin Mapping Matrix showing recommended warehouse storage coordinates; Bottom Action Bar: Hard Lock Batch Verification Trigger Console)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains parallel component checklists and spatial bin coordinates layouts side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The right spatial bin map collapses down into a modal helper sheet to guarantee compact data table dimensions for multi-item components)

key_visible_sections.title: SCM Warehouse Bin Target Recommendation Dock

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active warehouse material-handler or assembly lead tokens -> Extract active multi-tenant legal context -> Execute state request payload fetch from ManufacturingService.getMaterialStagingRequirements()
user_progression_routes.on_item_row_focus: Query SCM spatial storage engines dynamically to re-hydrate recommended bin options for the highlighted component item line

redirection_rules.condition: If a picked material component lot sequence matches an item code with an active quality hold flag from QMS databases
redirection_rules.action: Intercept row updates instantly, throw visual highlighting warning style 'Component Lot Quarantined', and freeze the final batch verification trigger deactivating submissions

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User inputs a source bin tracking location coordinate other than the system-recommended index cell path
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop structural system override window requesting alternate bin availability metrics, actual count entries verification, and a valid inventory adjustment reason log specification

atoms.type: Tabular Numeric Entry Input Component Box

molecules.composition: Combines component part number alphanumeric tag + descriptive name text string + engineering base recipe quantity row label + input_quantity_picked field box + interactive barcode scanner emulation toggle key component
Combines spatial bin address label link (e.g., ZONE1-AISLE4-BIN12) + on-hand volume numeric stock block + unit batch tracking lot identification string fields

organisms.composition: Dynamic calculating spreadsheet table grid tracking components rows looping across nested parts recipes arrays records, creating selectable interactive rows mapped to internal data state variables collection structures.
Contextual vertical widget sub-panel displaying matching instances rows elements of recommended_bin_coordinate_capsule molecules, tracking real-time available inventory levels balances caches tiers.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Precision monospaced fonts stack used strictly on part numbers, bin coordinates addresses, lot tags, and numeric integers tracking entries to shield vertical grids spreadsheet line alignments perfectly)

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.kitting_success_teal: #10B981 (Emerald Green Balanced Picking Staging Operations Core Focus Hue Accent)
color_palette_hex.kitting_shortage_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Mismatch Inventory Variance Highline Alert Status Glow Border)
color_palette_hex.bin_recommendation_indigo: #312E81 (Deep Indigo Treasury Space Target Available Capacity Allocation Highlight)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard console panel layout section boundary padding parameters fields)
spacing_and_borders.spreadsheet_row_height_density: 2.5rem (40px high-density layout configurations maximizing multi-column tracking grids text spacing fields)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Component Framework Partition Separators Layout Line)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: border-color properties modify context setting map value to #3B82F6 over an immediate 90ms duration curves execution window framework
border outline border-color updates framework parameters properties to color value #EF4444 indicating broken lot validation properties loops

accessibility_aria_roles.bom_kitting_allocation_grid_canvas: role='form' parsing accounting and inventory staging inputs validations controls elements grids matrices
accessibility_aria_roles.scm_warehouse_bin_allocator_vault: role='region' accompanied by explicit aria-live='polite' configuration fields monitoring real-time inventory storage suggestions updates parameters models

kitting_components_checklist_matrix.part_name: Embedded Logic Processing Unit SMD-X9 Core Architecture

local_reactive_state_variables.active_kitting_row_cell_id: Tracks currently focused component spreadsheet line identifier string context key lookup values (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_bin_deviation_override_visible: Boolean state variable dictating presentation configurations parameters toggling alternative bin justification forms windows overlays
local_reactive_state_variables.kitting_checklist_reactive_collection: Reactive array collection caching ongoing picked quantities additions, scanning hardware parameters updates, and target lot codes before final staging state validation blocks actions submissions

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared systems global tenant context code parameters routing multi-tenant application domains boundaries configurations across business modules execution layers
global_application_context_bindings.scm_warehouse_inventory_shared_cache: Global datastore cache saving active multi-tenant warehouse stock balance snapshots locally to preserve precise synchronization checks variables between production staging and logistics domains

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous module scripts deploying precise calculation structural functions to eliminate rounding data errors across component allocation tallies
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Updating kitting row picked values structures following key input updates or barcode reading streams events must refresh user layout grids configurations inside a threshold execution target runtime ceiling constraint parameter of 6ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind fetched warehouse locations details records parameters maps directly inside local scm_warehouse_bin_allocator_vault store components cache views, and assign active lookup keys into active_kitting_row_cell_id

Perform inventory balance checkout verification checking formulas; publish processing transaction log variables packets; update matching row indicators inline tracking variables properties updating indicators metrics to `FULFILLED`; close active workspace layouts frames

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /hr/org-charts (Complete structural assembly execution track; advance router context coordinates tracking parameter forward out of heavy product engine execution blocks directly over into standard Core Operations & Corporate Infrastructure track starting at HR Screen HR_SCR_001 Viewport Framework)
